texto: This couldn’t be just a lake. No real water was ever blue like that. A light breeze stirred the pin-cherry tree beside the window, ruffled the feathers of a fat sea gull promenading on the pink rocks below. The breeze was full of evergreen spice.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dorothy Maywood Bird: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “This couldn’t be just a lake. No real water was ever blue like that.
